debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
j : ℕ
hj : j ∈ Finset.range n
ℓ : ℕ
hℓ : ℓ ∈ Finset.range k
⊢ |(↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n| ≤ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n

proof:
have hlk : (↑ℓ + 1 : ℝ) ≤ ↑k := by norm_cast; exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ)
    have hk0 : (0 : ℝ) < ↑k := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk
    have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) < ↑n := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
    rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [hab, hlk, hk0, hn0] }
successful_attempts:
have hlk : (↑ℓ + 1 : ℝ) ≤ ↑k := by norm_cast; exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ)
    have hk0 : (0 : ℝ) < ↑k := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk
    have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) < ↑n := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
    rw [abs_le]; constructor <;> { field_simp [hn, hk]; nlinarith [hab, hlk, hk0, hn0] }
